selected_tweets.author: KobeissiLetter
selected_tweets.text: Anthropic is in its own league.  Just days after the launch of Anthropic's Claude Fable 5, the company suspended access to the model after US authorities raised "security concerns."  Anthropic said it was ordered to "suspend foreign nationals" from using Claude Fable 5, and self-described the model as "too powerful."  "The net effect of this order is that we must abruptly disable Fable 5 and Mythos 5 for all our customers to ensure compliance," Anthropic said.  In other words, Anthropic's latest AI model is so powerful, that the company and US government are now questioning who should even have access to it.  Less than 4 years ago, ChatGPT did not exist. Today, AI is arguably the most powerful technology ever created.  Truly incredible.

review_context.editorial_focus: סקירת הכנה לפתיחת שבוע: התמקד בנושאים שיכולים ללוות את פתיחת המסחר הקרובה. אל תכתוב כאילו המסחר פתוח היום.
